title: torilis orientalis
intro: Torilis orientalis, also known as Eastern Hemlock or Wild Parsnip, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Torilis orientalis include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
